This has focused empirical attention on markups, the ratios of price to marginal cost in product markets, and markdowns, the ratios of inputs’ marginal products to their paid wage in factor markets. In this review, I offer a conceptual overview of both metrics and survey recent research examining them. I pay particular attention to the distinct interests that microeconomists and macroeconomists have had regarding these metrics, as well as topics that have bridged and are bridging these often distinct literatures.
32871.zh_abstract: 近年来，许多领域的经济学家对市场势力的兴趣激增，远远超出了其传统的产业组织领域。这使实证研究聚焦于产品市场的加成率（价格与边际成本之比）和要素市场的折价率（投入要素的边际产品与其支付工资之比）。在本综述中，我提供了这两个指标的概念性概述，并调查了近期对它们进行的研究。我特别关注微观经济学家和宏观经济学家对这些指标的不同兴趣，以及已经并将这些通常不同的文献联系起来的话题。
32871.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, EFG, IO, LS, PR；JEL：D4, E3, L0

32870.title: The Potential Long-Run Implications of a Permanently-Expanded Child Tax Credit
32870.zh_title: 永久性扩大儿童税收抵免的潜在长期影响
32870.abstract: For many of those who worked to include an expanded Child Tax Credit in the 2021 American Rescue Plan, an important motivation was to test the feasibility and effectiveness of a permanent U.S. child allowance similar to those provided in other rich countries. Because this expansion was short-lived, however, evaluations of its effects cannot provide complete evidence on the long-run effects of a permanently expanded CTC. We leverage theoretical predictions from standard economic models, behavioral science, and child development frameworks, along with empirical evidence from literature evaluating previous long-term cash and quasi-cash transfers to families with children, to predict the likely long-run impacts of a permanent child allowance. We find that it would lead to increased future earnings and tax payments, improved health and longevity, and reduced health care, crime, and child protection costs; using conventional valuations, benefits to society outweigh costs nearly 10 to 1, with most benefits due to credit refundability.
32870.zh_abstract: 对于许多致力于将扩大儿童税收抵免纳入2021年《美国救援计划》的人来说，一个重要的动机是测试类似于其他富裕国家提供的永久性美国儿童津贴的可行性和有效性。然而，由于这次扩大是短暂的，对其效果的评估无法为永久性扩大儿童税收抵免的长期影响提供完整证据。我们利用标准经济模型、行为科学和儿童发展框架的理论预测，以及评估以往向有子女家庭提供长期现金和准现金转移的文献中的实证证据，来预测永久性儿童津贴可能产生的长期影响。我们发现，这将导致未来收入和税收增加、健康和寿命改善，以及医疗、犯罪和儿童保护成本降低；使用传统估值方法，社会收益与成本之比接近10比1，其中大部分收益归因于税收抵免的可退还性。

32869.title: The Politicization of Social Responsibility
32869.authors: Todd A. Gormley, Manish Jha, Meng Wang
32869.abstract: Institutional investors are less likely to support shareholder proposals on environmental and social issues for firms headquartered in Republican-led states. The decline in support has become more pronounced in recent years, aligning with politicians emphasizing companies’ social responsibility efforts, and among firms receiving state-level subsidies and tax breaks. Investor support also varies with shifts in state leadership, dropping by 12 percentage points in the same state when Republicans are in control instead of Democrats. The findings indicate that institutional investors prioritize maximizing shareholder value and that politicians can influence investor votes by altering the value implications of shareholder proposals.
32869.zh_abstract: 机构投资者不太可能支持总部位于共和党主导州的公司在环境和社会问题上的股东提案。近年来，这种支持下降的趋势变得更加明显，与政治家强调公司社会责任努力的趋势相一致，并且在获得州级补贴和税收减免的公司中尤为突出。投资者支持也随着州领导层的变化而变化，在同一个州，当共和党控制时，支持率比民主党控制时下降12个百分点。研究结果表明，机构投资者优先考虑股东价值最大化，而政治家可以通过改变股东提案的价值含义来影响投资者的投票。

32868.title: Spillovers of U.S. Fiscal Challenges: The Global Impact of U.S. Fiscal Dominance Concerns on Interest Rates in Emerging and Developed Markets
32868.zh_title: 美国财政挑战的溢出效应：美国财政主导担忧对新兴市场和发达市场利率的全球影响
32868.authors: Joshua Aizenman, William Eldén, Yothin Jinjarak, Gazi Salah Uddin, Frida Widholm
32868.abstract: This study examines the international spillovers of U.S. inflationary spells and fiscal concerns on policy interest rates in Emerging Market Economies (EMEs) and Developed Economies (DEs). Previous research has focused on fiscal concerns in domestic environments, overlooking cross-border impacts. Using data from EMEs and DEs, we construct a novel index of fiscal dominance concerns through Principal Components Analysis to capture international fiscal dynamics. The results are confirmed by robustness analysis and show that greater U.S. fiscal challenges affect negatively the policy rates in both EMEs and DEs, with a greater impact observed in EMEs. Moreover, a low degree of financial repression in EMEs is associated with more significant spillover effects from greater U.S. fiscal challenges. Our findings offer insights into the complex interplay between financial repression, central bank independence, and global market integration in shaping a country's resilience to international financial influences.
32868.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了美国通胀事件和财政担忧对新兴市场经济体和发达经济体政策利率的国际溢出效应。以往的研究侧重于国内环境中的财政担忧，忽视了跨境影响。利用新兴市场经济体和发达经济体的数据，我们通过主成分分析构建了一个新颖的财政主导担忧指数，以捕捉国际财政动态。稳健性分析证实了结果，表明美国财政挑战加剧对新兴市场经济体和发达经济体的政策利率产生负面影响，其中对新兴市场经济体的影响更大。此外，新兴市场经济体中较低的金融抑制程度与美国财政挑战加剧带来的更显著溢出效应相关。我们的研究结果揭示了金融抑制、央行独立性和全球市场一体化在塑造一国抵御国际金融影响能力方面的复杂相互作用。

32867.title: Can Technical Education in High School Smooth Postsecondary Transitions for Students with Disabilities?
32867.zh_title: 高中技术教育能否为残疾学生顺利过渡到中学后阶段提供支持？
32867.authors: Eric Brunner, Shaun Dougherty, Stephen Ross
32867.abstract: Career Technical Education (CTE) programs have been proposed as a valuable strategy for supporting transition to independence among students with disabilities. We exploit a discontinuity created by admissions thresholds to estimate the causal impact of attending a CTE high school on the short- and long-term outcomes of students with disabilities. Our findings suggest attending CTE high schools has large positive effects on completing high school on time, employment, and earnings. Attending CTE schools also results in more time spent with non-disabled peers and higher 10th grade test scores. These results appear concentrated among male students, but the sample of female students is too small to support strong conclusions about outcomes. Notably, these estimated effects appear broad based over disability type, time spent with non-disabled peers in 8th grade, and previous academic performance.
32867.zh_abstract: 职业与技术教育项目已被提议作为支持残疾学生向独立过渡的重要策略。我们利用招生门槛造成的不连续性来估计就读职业与技术教育高中对残疾学生短期和长期结果的因果影响。我们的研究结果表明，就读职业与技术教育高中对按时完成高中学业、就业和收入有显著的积极影响。就读职业与技术教育学校还导致与非残疾同龄人相处的时间增加，以及10年级考试成绩的提高。这些结果似乎集中在男性学生中，但女性学生样本量太小，无法对结果得出强有力的结论。值得注意的是，这些估计的影响在残疾类型、8年级时与非残疾同龄人相处的时间以及以往学业表现方面似乎具有广泛的基础。
32867.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH；JEL：I14, I21, I24, I26

32866.title: Poverty and Health
32866.authors: Adriana Lleras-Muney, Hannes Schwandt, Laura Wherry
32866.abstract: Poverty is strongly associated with worse health across countries and within countries across individuals. However, not all poor individuals suffer from poor health: the effects of poverty on health vary across place and time. In this review, we discuss the evidence documenting these patterns, and the reasons for the associations. We then provide an overview of what is known about policies that may improve the health of the poor. We focus primarily on the modern-day United States, but also discuss evidence from historical experiences and low- and middle-income countries. Throughout we discuss areas in need of future research.
32866.zh_abstract: 贫困与较差的健康状况密切相关，无论是在国家之间还是在国家内部的个体之间。然而，并非所有贫困个体都遭受健康不佳之苦：贫困对健康的影响因地点和时间而异。在本综述中，我们讨论了记录这些模式的证据，以及这些关联的原因。然后，我们概述了关于可能改善贫困人口健康的政策已知信息。我们主要关注现代美国，但也讨论了历史经验以及低收入和中等收入国家的证据。在整个过程中，我们讨论了需要未来研究的领域。
32866.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DEV, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H50, I1, I14, I18, I30

32865.title: Crypto Tax Evasion
32865.authors: Tom G. Meling, Magne Mogstad, Arnstein Vestre
32865.abstract: We quantify and explain the extent of crypto tax noncompliance and evasion, and assess the efficacy of alternative tax enforcement interventions. The context of the study is Norway. This context allows us to address key measurement challenges by combining de-anonymized crypto trading data with individual tax returns, survey data, and information from tax enforcement interventions. We find that crypto tax noncompliance is pervasive, even among investors trading on exchanges that share identifiable trading data with tax authorities. However, since most crypto investors owe little in crypto-related taxes, enforcement strategies need to be well-targeted or cheap for benefits to outweigh costs.
32865.zh_abstract: 我们量化并解释了加密货币税务不合规和逃税的程度，并评估了替代性税务执法干预措施的有效性。研究背景是挪威。这一背景使我们能够通过将去匿名化的加密货币交易数据与个人纳税申报表、调查数据以及税务执法干预信息相结合，来解决关键的测量挑战。我们发现，加密货币税务不合规现象普遍存在，即使在那些与税务机关共享可识别交易数据的交易所进行交易的投资者中也是如此。然而，由于大多数加密货币投资者欠缴的加密货币相关税款很少，执法策略需要精准定位或成本低廉，才能使收益超过成本。

32864.title: Busing to Opportunity? The Impacts of the METCO Voluntary School Desegregation Program on Urban Students of Color
32864.zh_title: 校车接送通往机遇？METCO自愿学校废除种族隔离项目对城市有色人种学生的影响
32864.abstract: School assignment policies are a key lever to increase access to high performing schools and to promote racial and socioeconomic integration. For over 50 years, the Metropolitan Council for Educational Opportunity (METCO) has bussed students of color from Boston, Massachusetts to relatively wealthier and predominantly White suburbs. Using a combination of digitized historical records and administrative data, I analyze the short and long run effects of attending a high-performing suburban school for applicants to the METCO program. I compare those with and without offers to enroll in suburban schools. I use a two-stage least squares approach that utilizes the waitlist assignment priorities and controls for a rich set of characteristics from birth records and application data. Attending a suburban school boosts 10th grade Math and English test scores by 0.13 and 0.21 standard deviations respectively. The program reduces dropout rates by 75 percent and increases on-time high school graduation by 13 percentage points. The suburban schools increase four-year college aspirations by 17 percentage points and enrollment by 21 percentage points. Participation results in a 12 percentage point increase in four-year college graduation rates. Enrollment increases average earnings at age 35 by $\$16,250$. Evidence of tracking to lower performing classes in the suburban schools suggests these effects could be larger with access to more advanced coursework. Effects are strongest for students whose parents did not graduate college.
32864.zh_abstract: 学校分配政策是增加进入高绩效学校机会以及促进种族和社会经济融合的关键杠杆。50多年来，大都会教育机会委员会一直用校车将马萨诸塞州波士顿的有色人种学生送往相对富裕且以白人为主的郊区。通过结合数字化历史记录和行政数据，我分析了就读高绩效郊区学校对METCO项目申请者的短期和长期影响。我比较了那些获得和未获得郊区学校入学机会的申请者。我采用两阶段最小二乘法，利用候补名单分配优先级，并控制了来自出生记录和申请数据的大量特征。就读郊区学校使10年级数学和英语考试成绩分别提高了0.13和0.21个标准差。该项目将辍学率降低了75%，并将按时高中毕业率提高了13个百分点。郊区学校将四年制大学愿望提高了17个百分点，入学率提高了21个百分点。参与该项目使四年制大学毕业率提高了12个百分点。入学使35岁时的平均收入增加了16,250美元。在郊区学校被分到较低水平班级的证据表明，如果能获得更高级的课程，这些影响可能会更大。对于父母未大学毕业的学生，影响最为显著。

32863.title: Learning Firm Conduct: Pass-Through as a Foundation for Instrument Relevance
32863.zh_title: 学习企业行为：成本转嫁作为工具相关性的基础
32863.authors: Adam Dearing, Lorenzo Magnolfi, Daniel Quint, Christopher J. Sullivan, Sarah B. Waldfogel
32863.abstract: Researchers often test firm conduct models using pass-through regressions or instrumental variables (IV) methods. The former has limited applicability; the latter relies on potentially irrelevant instruments. We show the falsifiable restriction underlying the IV method generalizes the pass-through regression, and cost pass-through differences are the economic determinants of instrument relevance. We analyze standard instruments' relevance and link instrument selection to target counterfactuals. We illustrate our findings via simulations and an application to the Washington marijuana market. Testing conduct using targeted instruments, we find the optimal ad valorem tax closely matches the actual rate.
32863.zh_abstract: 研究者通常使用成本转嫁回归或工具变量方法来检验企业行为模型。前者适用性有限；后者依赖于可能不相关的工具。我们证明了工具变量方法背后的可证伪限制条件是对成本转嫁回归的推广，而成本转嫁差异是工具相关性的经济决定因素。我们分析了标准工具的相关性，并将工具选择与目标反事实联系起来。我们通过模拟和对华盛顿大麻市场的应用来说明我们的发现。使用有针对性的工具检验行为，我们发现最优从价税率与实际税率非常接近。

32862.title: The Effects of Teacher Strikes on Compensation, Working Conditions, and Productivity
32862.zh_title: 教师罢工对薪酬、工作条件和生产力的影响
32862.authors: Melissa Arnold Lyon, Matthew A. Kraft, Matthew P. Steinberg
32862.abstract: We examine how teacher strikes in the United States affect compensation, working conditions, and productivity with an original dataset of 745 teacher strikes between 2007 and 2024. Using an event study framework, we find that the average strike leads to a 6% ($\$7,629$) increase in combined annual wages and benefits and a 0.5 student (3.2%) decline in pupil-teacher ratios after five years. There is little evidence of sizable impacts on student achievement up to five years post-strike, though strikes lasting 10 or more days decrease math achievement in the short-term.
32862.zh_abstract: 我们利用2007年至2024年间745次教师罢工的原始数据集，研究了美国教师罢工对薪酬、工作条件和生产力的影响。通过事件研究框架，我们发现平均而言，罢工五年后，年度工资和福利总和增加了6%（7,629美元），生师比下降了0.5名学生（3.2%）。几乎没有证据表明罢工对罢工后五年内的学生成绩有显著影响，尽管持续10天或更长时间的罢工在短期内会降低数学成绩。

32861.title: Taxation and Household Decisions: an Intertemporal Analysis
32861.zh_title: 税收与家庭决策：跨期分析
32861.authors: Mary Ann Bronson, Daniel Haanwinckel, Maurizio Mazzocco
32861.abstract: How do different income taxation systems affect household decisions and welfare? We answer this question by first documenting the strong labor supply disincentives for secondary earners of the U.S. tax system and by using variations from the Bush Tax Cuts to assess their effects on intra-household specialization. We then develop a lifecycle model incorporating labor supply, marriage and divorce decisions with limited commitment, household production, human capital accumulation, and assortative mating. After estimating and validating the model with various datasets, we evaluate four tax systems: a U.S.-like income-splitting system, an individual taxation system, a flexible general joint system, and an income-splitting system with secondary-earner deductions. We find that the individual taxation system provides higher welfare than income splitting but increases inequality. The general joint system offers the highest welfare but is complex to implement. The income-splitting system with a secondary-earner deduction improves welfare and reduces inequality while maintaining simplicity.
32861.zh_abstract: 不同的所得税制度如何影响家庭决策和福利？我们首先记录了美国税收制度对次要收入者的强烈劳动供给抑制效应，并利用布什减税政策的变化来评估其对家庭内专业分工的影响。然后，我们构建了一个生命周期模型，该模型包含劳动供给、婚姻和离婚决策（有限承诺）、家庭生产、人力资本积累和选型婚配。在利用多个数据集估计和验证模型后，我们评估了四种税收制度：类似美国的收入分割制、个人税制、灵活的通用联合税制以及带有次要收入者扣除的收入分割制。我们发现，个人税制比收入分割制提供了更高的福利，但增加了不平等。通用联合税制提供了最高的福利，但实施起来复杂。带有次要收入者扣除的收入分割制在保持简单性的同时提高了福利并减少了不平等。

32860.title: Race, Ethnicity, and Measurement Error
32860.authors: Bruce D. Meyer, Nikolas Mittag, Derek Wu
32860.abstract: Large literatures have analyzed racial and ethnic disparities in economic outcomes and access to the safety net. For such analyses that rely on survey data, it is crucial that survey accuracy does not vary by race and ethnicity. Otherwise, the observed disparities may be confounded by differences in survey error. In this paper, we review existing studies that use linked data to assess the reporting of key programs (including SNAP, Social Security, Unemployment Insurance, TANF, Medicaid, Medicare, and private pensions) in major Census Bureau surveys, aiming to extract the evidence on differences in survey accuracy by race and ethnicity. Our key finding is a strong and robust, but previously largely unnoticed, pattern of greater measurement error for Black and Hispanic individuals and households relative to whites. As the dominant error is under-reporting for a wide variety of programs, samples, and surveys, the implication is that the safety net better supports minority groups than the survey data suggest, through higher program receipt and greater poverty reduction. These biases in survey estimates are large in many cases examined in the literature. We conclude that racial and ethnic minorities are inadequately served by our large household surveys and that researchers should cautiously interpret survey-based estimates of racial and ethnic differences in program receipt and post-benefit income. We briefly discuss paths forward.
32860.zh_abstract: 大量文献分析了经济结果和安全网可及性方面的种族和族裔差异。对于依赖调查数据的此类分析，调查准确性不因种族和族裔而异至关重要。否则，观察到的差异可能会因调查误差的差异而混淆。在本文中，我们回顾了现有研究，这些研究使用关联数据来评估主要人口普查局调查中关键项目（包括SNAP、社会保障、失业保险、TANF、医疗补助、医疗保险和私人养老金）的报告情况，旨在提取关于种族和族裔调查准确性差异的证据。我们的主要发现是，与白人相比，黑人和西班牙裔个人及家庭存在强烈且稳健但此前基本未被注意到的更大测量误差模式。由于在多种项目、样本和调查中，主要误差是漏报，这意味着安全网对少数群体的支持比调查数据所显示的更好，表现为更高的项目领取率和更大的减贫效果。在文献考察的许多案例中，这些调查估计的偏差很大。我们得出结论，我们的大型住户调查未能充分服务于种族和族裔少数群体，研究者应谨慎解释基于调查的关于项目领取和福利后收入的种族和族裔差异估计。我们简要讨论了前进方向。

32859.title: The Drivers of Post-Pandemic Inflation
32859.zh_title: 疫情后通胀的驱动因素
32859.abstract: Post-covid inflation was predominantly driven by unexpectedly strong demand forces, not only in the United States, but also in the Euro Area. In comparison, the inflationary impact of adverse supply shocks was less pronounced, even though these shocks significantly constrained economic activity. With output already weakened by these unfavourable supply conditions, any attempt by the European Central Bank to further mitigate the demand-driven inflationary pressures---to maintain inflation near its 2-percent target---would have severely hampered an already anaemic recovery.
32859.zh_abstract: 疫情后的通胀主要是由出乎意料的强劲需求力量驱动的，这不仅在美国如此，在欧元区也是如此。相比之下，不利供给冲击的通胀影响不那么显著，尽管这些冲击显著限制了经济活动。由于产出已经因这些不利的供给条件而疲软，欧洲央行若试图进一步缓解需求驱动的通胀压力——以将通胀维持在接近2%的目标水平——将会严重阻碍本已乏力的复苏。
32859.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：E30, E31, E32, E37, E52, E58

32858.title: Dual Credit Markets: Income Risk, Household Debt, and Consumption
32858.zh_title: 双重信贷市场：收入风险、家庭债务与消费
32858.authors: David A. Matsa, Brian T. Melzer, Michal Zator
32858.abstract: Many young employees work on a temporary basis, which entails significantly greater income risk than “permanent” work, even for jobs in the same occupation and at a similar wage. We find that this income uncertainty leads lenders to ration credit to temporary workers, precisely at the stage of life when permanent workers rely on mortgages to invest in housing and loans to smooth consumption and purchase durable goods. Labor laws that improve job security for permanent workers create a dual credit market alongside the dual labor market, making it harder for young adults to establish financial independence and new families.
32858.zh_abstract: 许多年轻员工从事临时工作，这带来的收入风险显著高于“永久”工作，即使是在相同职业和相似工资水平的工作中。我们发现，这种收入不确定性导致贷款人对临时工进行信贷配给，而这恰恰发生在永久工人依赖抵押贷款投资住房、依靠贷款平滑消费和购买耐用品的生命阶段。改善永久工人工作保障的劳动法在双重劳动力市场之外创造了双重信贷市场，使得年轻成年人更难建立财务独立和组建新家庭。
32858.meta: Programs：CF, LS；JEL：D14, G51, J41, J68, R21

32857.title: CBDCs, Payment Firms, and Geopolitics
32857.zh_title: 央行数字货币、支付公司与地缘政治
32857.authors: Tobias Berg, Jan Keil, Felix Martini, Manju Puri
32857.abstract: We analyze the effect of a major central bank digital currency (CBDC) – the digital euro – on the payment industry to find remarkably heterogeneous effects. Stock prices of U.S. payment firms decrease, while stock prices of European payment firms increase in response to positive announcements on the digital euro. Bank stocks do not react. We estimate a loss in market capitalization of USD 127 billion for U.S. payment firms, vis-à-vis a gain of USD 23 billion for European payment firms. Our results emphasize the medium-of-exchange function of CBDCs and point to a novel geopolitical dimension of CBDCs: enhanced autonomy in payments.
32857.zh_abstract: 我们分析了主要央行数字货币——数字欧元——对支付行业的影响，发现了显著异质性的效应。美国支付公司的股价下跌，而欧洲支付公司的股价则因数字欧元的积极公告而上涨。银行股没有反应。我们估计美国支付公司的市值损失了1270亿美元，而欧洲支付公司则获得了230亿美元的收益。我们的结果强调了央行数字货币的交易媒介功能，并指出了央行数字货币的一个新的地缘政治维度：增强的支付自主权。
32857.meta: Programs：CF, ME；JEL：G1, G20, G21, G22, G23, G24, G28, G29

32856.title: The Effect of Emergency Financial Assistance on Employment and Earnings
32856.zh_title: 紧急经济援助对就业和收入的影响
32856.authors: Daniel M. Hungerman, David C. Phillips, Kevin Rinz, James X. Sullivan
32856.abstract: We examine the labor supply effects of short-term income transfers for families experiencing a housing crisis. We link callers of an emergency assistance homelessness prevention hotline to their federal tax records and measure their employment & earnings in years surrounding their calls. Our methodology exploits quasi-random variation in the availability of assistance to compare similar families receiving and not receiving funds. Looking up to four years post-assistance, we find evidence, especially for the lowest earners, of earnings and employment gains, and overall we find no evidence that assistance lowers earnings or employment. Our results indicate that any income effect of temporary transfers for those in crisis is minimal and that these transfers may convey labor market benefits for the poorest of the poor.
32856.zh_abstract: 我们研究了短期收入转移对经历住房危机的家庭的劳动供给效应。我们将紧急援助无家可归预防热线的来电者与其联邦税务记录相关联，并衡量他们在来电前后几年的就业和收入。我们的方法利用了援助可用性的准随机变化，来比较收到和未收到资金的相似家庭。在援助后长达四年的时间里，我们发现证据表明，特别是对于最低收入者，收入和就业有所增加，并且总体而言，我们没有发现援助会降低收入或就业的证据。我们的结果表明，对于处于危机中的人来说，临时转移的任何收入效应都很小，并且这些转移可能为最贫困的人群带来劳动力市场收益。

32823.title: Creditor-on-Creditor Violence and Secured Debt Dynamics
32823.zh_title: 债权人之间的暴力行为与担保债务动态
32823.authors: Samuel Antill, Neng Wang, Zhaoli Jiang
32823.abstract: Secured lenders have recently demanded a new condition in distressed debt restructurings: competing secured lenders must lose priority. We model the implications of this “creditor-on-creditor violence” trend. In our dynamic model, secured lenders enjoy higher priority in default. However, secured lenders take value-destroying actions to boost their own recovery: they sell assets inefficiently early. We show that this creates an ex-ante tradeoff between secured and unsecured debt that matches recent empirical evidence. Introducing the recent creditor-conflict trend in this model endogenously increases secured credit spreads. Importantly, it also increases ex-ante total surplus: restructurings endogenously introduce efficient state-contingent debt reduction.
32823.zh_abstract: 有担保贷款人最近在困境债务重组中提出了一项新条件：竞争性的有担保贷款人必须失去优先权。我们对这种“债权人之间的暴力行为”趋势的影响进行了建模。在我们的动态模型中，有担保贷款人在违约时享有更高的优先权。然而，有担保贷款人会采取破坏价值的行动来提高自身的回收率：他们过早地低效出售资产。我们表明，这会在有担保债务和无担保债务之间产生一种事前权衡，这与近期实证证据相符。在此模型中引入近期的债权人冲突趋势，会内生性地提高有担保信贷利差。重要的是，这也增加了事前总剩余：重组内生性地引入了有效的状态依存债务削减。

32895.title: Mental Health, Substance Use, and Child Maltreatment
32895.zh_title: 心理健康、药物滥用与儿童虐待
32895.authors: Mir M. Ali, Thanh Lu, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Angélica Meinhofer
32895.abstract: Child maltreatment is a pressing concern in the United States, with more than four million children referred to child protective services in 2022. Reducing child maltreatment is a national health objective given the substantial, negative consequences for children who experience maltreatment, both in the short- and long-term. Parental mental health and substance use disorders are strongly associated with child maltreatment. In this study, we use administrative data over the period 2004 to 2021 to study the relationship between the number of mental health and substance use treatment centers per county and child maltreatment reports. Our findings provide evidence that better access to mental health and substance use treatment reduces child maltreatment reports. In particular, an 8% increase in the supply of treatment would reduce maltreatment reports by 1%. These findings suggest that recent and ongoing efforts by the federal government to expand mental health and substance use treatment availability may lead to reduced child maltreatment.
32895.zh_abstract: 儿童虐待是美国一个紧迫的问题，2022年有超过400万儿童被转介至儿童保护服务机构。鉴于遭受虐待的儿童在短期和长期内都会面临严重的负面后果，减少儿童虐待已成为一项国家健康目标。父母的心理健康和药物滥用障碍与儿童虐待密切相关。在本研究中，我们使用2004年至2021年期间的行政数据，研究每个县的心理健康和药物滥用治疗中心数量与儿童虐待报告之间的关系。我们的发现提供了证据，表明更好地获得心理健康和药物滥用治疗可以减少儿童虐待报告。具体而言，治疗供应量增加8%将使虐待报告减少1%。这些发现表明，联邦政府近期和正在进行的扩大心理健康和药物滥用治疗可及性的努力，可能会导致儿童虐待的减少。
32895.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：H0, I0, K0

32894.title: Conviction, Incarceration, and Recidivism: Understanding the Revolving Door
32894.zh_title: 定罪、监禁与再犯：理解旋转门现象
32894.authors: John Eric Humphries, Aurelie Ouss, Kamelia Stavreva, Megan T. Stevenson, Winnie van Dijk
32894.abstract: Noncarceral conviction is a common outcome of criminal court cases: for every individual incarcerated, there are approximately three who were recently convicted but not sentenced to prison or jail. We extend the binary-treatment judge IV framework to settings with multiple treatments and use it to study the consequences of noncarceral conviction. We outline assumptions under which widely-used 2SLS regressions recover margin-specific treatment effects, relate these assumptions to models of judge decision-making, and derive an expression that provides intuition about the direction and magnitude of asymptotic bias when a key assumption on judge decision-making is not met. We find that noncarceral conviction (relative to dismissal) leads to a large and long-lasting increase in recidivism for felony defendants in Virginia. In contrast, incarceration (relative to noncarceral conviction) leads to a short-run reduction in recidivism, consistent with incapacitation. Our empirical results suggest that noncarceral felony conviction is an important and overlooked driver of recidivism.
32894.zh_abstract: 非监禁式定罪是刑事法庭案件的常见结果：每有一人被监禁，大约就有三人最近被定罪但未被判处监禁。我们将二元处理的法官工具变量框架扩展到多处理情形，并用以研究非监禁式定罪的后果。我们概述了广泛使用的两阶段最小二乘回归能够恢复边际特定处理效应的假设条件，将这些假设与法官决策模型联系起来，并推导出一个表达式，该表达式提供了当关于法官决策的关键假设不满足时渐近偏误方向和大小直观理解。我们发现，在弗吉尼亚州，对于重罪被告而言，非监禁式定罪（相对于撤销指控）会导致再犯率大幅且持久地上升。相比之下，监禁（相对于非监禁式定罪）会导致再犯率短期下降，这与 incapacitation 效应一致。我们的实证结果表明，非监禁式重罪定罪是再犯的一个重要且被忽视的驱动因素。

32893.title: Network Competition in the Airline Industry: An Empirical Framework
32893.zh_title: 航空业的网络竞争：一个实证框架
32893.abstract: The Hub-and-Spoke network is a defining feature of the airline industry. This paper is among the first in the literature to introduce an empirical framework for analyzing network competition among airlines. Airlines make market entry decisions and choose flight frequencies in the first stage, followed by price competition to attract passengers in the second stage. A key feature of this model is the linkage between direct and indirect flights, which is described by a technological relationship (and estimated using data) that proxies the Hub-and-Spoke network. The paper estimates the marginal costs of serving passengers and operating flights using first-order conditions, bounds the entry costs using inequalities derived from the reveal-preference argument, and employs a state-of-the-art econometric method to conduct inference for entry cost parameters. Ignoring network externality underestimates the benefits of operating an additional flight by 13.2%, and airlines would schedule 21.53% fewer one-stop flights had they made flight operation decisions independently for each market. To evaluate the impact of a hypothetical merger, the paper proposes a novel equilibrium concept that makes it feasible to compute the industry equilibria. Counterfactual analyses indicate that a hypothetical merger between Alaska and Virgin America would increase consumer surplus as the merged airline would offer direct flights in 10% more markets while the overall post-merger price effect would likely be muted.
32893.zh_abstract: 枢纽辐射式网络是航空业的一个显著特征。本文是文献中最早引入分析航空公司间网络竞争的实证框架的论文之一。航空公司首先在第一阶段做出市场进入决策并选择航班频率，随后在第二阶段进行价格竞争以吸引乘客。该模型的一个关键特征是直达航班与中转航班之间的关联，这种关联通过一种技术关系（并使用数据进行估计）来描述，该关系近似于枢纽辐射式网络。本文利用一阶条件估计了服务乘客和运营航班的边际成本，利用显示偏好论证推导出的不等式约束了进入成本，并采用先进的计量经济学方法对进入成本参数进行推断。忽略网络外部性会使运营额外航班的收益被低估13.2%，如果航空公司独立地为每个市场做出航班运营决策，它们将安排21.53%更少的中转航班。为了评估假设合并的影响，本文提出了一种新颖的均衡概念，使得计算行业均衡成为可能。反事实分析表明，阿拉斯加航空与维珍美国航空的假设合并将增加消费者剩余，因为合并后的航空公司将在多10%的市场中提供直达航班，而合并后的总体价格效应可能被削弱。

32892.title: Self-, Peer-, and Teacher Perceptions under School Tracking
32892.zh_title: 学校分轨制下的自我、同伴与教师认知
32892.authors: Ofer Malamud, Andreea Mitrut, Cristian Pop-Eleches, Miguel Urquiola
32892.abstract: We examine student, teacher, and peer perceptions of effort, ability, performance, and self-confidence in Romania’s highly tracked schools. We find that: (1) students just above a cutoff—tracked into high-achieving classes—have less favorable self-perceptions than those just below (“big-fish-little-pond” effects); (2) students perceive peers in their classes more favorably (“in-group bias”); (3) this bias is stronger in lower-achieving classes; (4) students perceive themselves more positively than others perceive them (“illusory superiority”); (5) this bias is stronger among lower-achieving students (“Krueger-Dunning effects”). In short, being tracked into lower-achieving classes does not appear to negatively affect self-perceptions.
32892.zh_abstract: 我们研究了罗马尼亚高度分轨学校中学生、教师和同伴对努力、能力、表现和自信的认知。我们发现：(1) 略高于分轨分数线——被分入高成就班级——的学生，其自我认知不如略低于分数线的学生（“大鱼小池塘”效应）；(2) 学生对自己班级同伴的认知更为积极（“内群体偏袒”）；(3) 这种偏袒在低成就班级中更强；(4) 学生对自己的评价比他人对他们的评价更积极（“虚幻优越感”）；(5) 这种偏袒在低成就学生中更强（“克鲁格-邓宁效应”）。简而言之，被分入低成就班级似乎并未对自我认知产生负面影响。

32891.title: Drivers of Racial Differences in C-Sections
32891.zh_title: 剖宫产种族差异的驱动因素
32891.authors: Adriana Corredor-Waldron, Janet Currie, Molly Schnell
32891.abstract: Black mothers with a trial of labor are 25 percent more likely to deliver by C-section than non-Hispanic White mothers. The gap is largest among mothers with the lowest risk and is reduced by only one-fifth when controlling for observed medical risk factors, sociodemographic characteristics, hospital, and physician or medical practice group. Remarkably, the gap disappears when performing a C-section is more costly due to a concurrent pre-labor C-section limiting surgical resources. This finding is consistent with provider discretion—rather than differences in unobserved medical risk—accounting for persistent racial disparities in delivery method. The additional intrapartum C-sections that occur among low-risk women when hospitals are unconstrained negatively impact infant health.
32891.zh_abstract: 尝试顺产的黑人母亲通过剖宫产分娩的可能性比非西班牙裔白人母亲高25%。这一差距在风险最低的母亲中最大，并且在控制了观察到的医学风险因素、社会人口特征、医院以及医生或医疗实践团体后，仅减少了五分之一。值得注意的是，当由于同时进行的产前剖宫产限制了手术资源而导致实施剖宫产成本更高时，这一差距消失了。这一发现与提供者自由裁量权——而非未观察到的医学风险差异——解释了分娩方式中持续存在的种族差异这一观点一致。当医院不受限制时，低风险女性中发生的额外产时剖宫产会对婴儿健康产生负面影响。

32890.title: Pensioners Without Borders
32890.authors: Salla Kalin, Antoine B. Levy, Mathilde Muñoz
32890.abstract: This paper examines the threat of tax competition and international migration in aging economies, where retirees represent a growing share of the tax base. In 2013, Portugal introduced a full tax exemption on foreign-source pensions for relocating retirees. Contrary to the traditional view that seniors “age in place,” flows of foreign EU pensioners to Portugal rose by a factor of 30 after the reform, and stocks by more than 3, with effects concentrated among wealthy, educated pensioners from high-tax countries. The implied migration elasticity of the foreign-pensioner stock is large (2–3) and rises over time. Retirement migration persists after temporary incentives expire, as delayed origin-country retaliation (source-based taxation) only partially offsets outflows. Peer effects and spatial clustering evidence social multipliers and generate housing and healthcare congestion in host regions. In our calibrated optimal tax model, large migration elasticities justify preferential rates on foreign pensions, but regressive windfall gains for domestic homeowners and the geographic concentration of congestion externalities make full exemptions unlikely to be optimal.
32890.zh_abstract: 本文考察了老龄化经济体中的税收竞争和国际移民威胁，在这些经济体中，退休人员构成了税基中日益增长的一部分。2013年，葡萄牙对移居本国的退休人员的外国来源养老金实行了完全免税。与传统观点认为老年人“原地养老”相反，改革后，流入葡萄牙的欧盟养老金领取者数量增加了30倍，存量增加了3倍多，其影响集中在来自高税收国家的富裕、受过教育的养老金领取者身上。外国养老金领取者存量的隐含移民弹性很大（2-3），并且随着时间的推移而上升。在临时激励措施到期后，退休移民仍然持续，因为延迟的原籍国报复（来源地征税）仅部分抵消了流出。同伴效应和空间聚集性证明了社会乘数的存在，并在接收地区造成了住房和医疗保健拥堵。在我们校准的最优税收模型中，大的移民弹性为对外国养老金实行优惠税率提供了理由，但国内房主获得的累退性意外收益以及拥堵外部性的地理集中使得完全免税不太可能是最优的。

32889.title: Measuring Bias in Job Recommender Systems: Auditing the Algorithms
32889.zh_title: 衡量职位推荐系统中的偏见：算法审计
32889.abstract: We use an algorithm audit of China’s four largest job boards to measure the causal effect of a job seeker’s gender on the jobs that are recommended to them, and to identify the algorithmic processes that generate those recommendations. Focusing on identical male and female worker profiles seeking jobs in the same industry-occupation cell, we find precisely estimated but modest amounts of gender bias: Jobs recommended to women pay 0.2 percent less, request 0.9 percent less experience, come from smaller firms, and contain .07 standard deviations more stereotypically female content such as requests for patience, carefulness, and beauty. The dominant driver of these gender gaps is content-based matching between posted job ads and the declared gender in new workers’ resumes. ‘Action-based’ mechanisms – based on a worker’s own actions or recruiters’ reactions to their resume – contribute relatively little to the gaps we measure.
32889.zh_abstract: 我们通过对中国四大招聘网站进行算法审计，来衡量求职者性别对其被推荐职位的因果效应，并识别产生这些推荐的算法过程。聚焦于在同一行业-职业单元中求职的相同男性和女性工人档案，我们发现性别偏见虽然精确估计但程度不大：推荐给女性的工作薪资低0.2%，要求经验少0.9%，来自较小的公司，并且包含比平均水平高0.07个标准差更多的刻板女性化内容，例如要求耐心、细心和美貌。这些性别差距的主要驱动因素是发布的招聘广告与新工人简历中声明的性别之间的基于内容的匹配。基于“行动”的机制——基于工人自身的行动或招聘人员对其简历的反应——对我们所测量的差距贡献相对较小。
32889.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：C99, J16, J71, M50, O33

32888.title: Markups: A Search-Theoretic Perspective
32888.zh_title: 加成率：一个搜寻理论的视角
32888.abstract: I derive a formula for the equilibrium distribution of markups in the search- theoretic model of imperfect competition of Butters (1977), Varian (1980), and Burdett and Judd (1983). The level of markups and the sign of the relationship between a seller’s markup and its size depends on the extent of search frictions, as well as on other deep parameters. Markups are efficient. Markups are positive even though the varieties produced by sellers are perfect substitutes. Markups are heterogeneous even when all sellers operate the same production technology. Markups depend on size, even though the substitutability between a variety and the others does not depend on how much of that variety is consumed. Interpreting these markups through the lens of the monopolistic competition model of Dixit and Stiglitz (1977) would lead one to recover incorrect and unstable buyers’ preferences. Interpreting these markups through the lens of the Dixit-Stiglitz model would also leads to incorrect policy recommendations. These results are a cautionary note on recent work in macroeconomics.
32888.zh_abstract: 我推导出了Butters (1977)、Varian (1980)以及Burdett和Judd (1983)的搜寻理论不完全竞争模型中加成率均衡分布的公式。加成率的水平以及卖方的加成率与其规模之间关系的符号，取决于搜寻摩擦的程度以及其他深层参数。加成率是有效率的。即使卖方生产的产品是完全替代品，加成率也为正。即使所有卖方都采用相同的生产技术，加成率也是异质的。即使一种产品与其他产品之间的替代性不取决于该产品的消费量，加成率也取决于规模。通过Dixit和Stiglitz (1977)的垄断竞争模型来解释这些加成率，会导致恢复出不正确且不稳定的买方偏好。通过Dixit-Stiglitz模型来解释这些加成率，也会导致错误的政策建议。这些结果是对近期宏观经济学研究的一个警示。

32887.title: Cash Bail and Trial Outcomes in an Early Twentieth-Century Southern Police Court
32887.zh_title: 二十世纪初南方警察法庭中的现金保释与审判结果
32887.abstract: Studies of modern misdemeanor adjudication find that courts set bail higher than is required to reasonably assure that nonviolent defendants who pose no immediate threat to the community will appear for trial. Some defendants languish in jail for extended periods during which time they lose income, employment, and the ability to provide an effective defense for themselves. This paper considers the downstream consequences of bail setting in an urban, southern police court in the 1910s. I find that defendants unwilling or unable to post cash bail were not more likely to be convicted or to be incarcerated than defendants who posted bail. Conditional on conviction, however, defendants who posted bail and returned for their hearings were about half as likely to serve time. Among those who served time, defendants who posted bail served just 6 percent as much time as defendants who did not post bail. The ability to post bail was correlated with unobserved income or wealth and I find evidence that defendants who did not post bail and served on the chain gang were employed in low-income jobs and likely faced a binding cash-in-advance constraint.
32887.zh_abstract: 对现代轻罪判决的研究发现，法院设定的保释金高于合理确保不对社区构成直接威胁的非暴力被告出庭受审所需的金额。一些被告在监狱中长时间滞留，期间他们失去收入、工作以及为自己提供有效辩护的能力。本文考察了1910年代南方城市警察法庭中保释金设定的下游后果。我发现，与缴纳保释金的被告相比，不愿或无力缴纳现金保释的被告并不更可能被定罪或监禁。然而，在定罪条件下，缴纳保释金并返回听证的被告服刑的可能性大约只有未缴纳保释金者的一半。在服刑者中，缴纳保释金的被告服刑时间仅为未缴纳保释金者的6%。缴纳保释金的能力与未观测到的收入或财富相关，并且我发现证据表明，未缴纳保释金并在链囚队服刑的被告从事低收入工作，很可能面临有约束力的现金预付约束。

32886.title: Electric Vehicles and the Energy Transition: Unintended Consequences of a Common Retail Rate Design
32886.zh_title: 电动汽车与能源转型：一种常见零售电价设计的意外后果
32886.authors: Megan R. Bailey, David P. Brown, Erica Myers, Blake C. Shaffer, Frank A. Wolak
32886.abstract: The growth of electric vehicles (EVs) raises new challenges for electricity systems. We implement a field experiment to assess the effect of time-of-use (TOU) pricing and managed charging on EV charging behavior. We find that while TOU pricing is effective at shifting EV charging into off-peak hours, it unintentionally induces new and larger “shadow peaks” of simultaneous charging. These shadow peaks lead to greater exceedance of local capacity constraints and advance the need for distribution network upgrades. In contrast, centrally managed charging solves the coordination problem, reducing transformer capacity requirements, and is well-tolerated by consumers in our setting.
32886.zh_abstract: 电动汽车的增长给电力系统带来了新的挑战。我们实施了一项实地实验，以评估分时电价和受控充电对电动汽车充电行为的影响。我们发现，虽然分时电价能有效将电动汽车充电转移到非高峰时段，但它意外地引发了新的、更大的同时充电“影子高峰”。这些影子高峰导致更频繁地超出本地容量限制，并提前了配电网络升级的需求。相比之下，集中管理的充电解决了协调问题，降低了变压器容量需求，并且在我们的环境中被消费者良好接受。

32885.title: Gender Diversity in Academic Entrepreneurship: Social Impact Motives and the NSF I-Corps Program
32885.zh_title: 学术创业中的性别多样性：社会影响动机与NSF I-Corps项目
32885.authors: April Burrage, Nilanjana Dasgupta, Ina Ganguli
32885.abstract: This study examines gender differences in the social impact and commercial motives for academic entrepreneurship using the National Science Foundation's Innovation Corps (NSF I-Corps) program. I-Corps provides experiential entrepreneurship training to faculty and graduate student researchers at local I-Corps university sites and through a nationwide program. Since the inception of I-Corps, only 20% of participants have been women. We first use survey data from one I-Corps university site to show that women participants had higher social entrepreneurial intentions compared to commercial entrepreneurial intentions, and these social entrepreneurial intentions were higher than men’s. We then extend and generalize this finding by analyzing 1,267 publicly available project summaries from the National I-Corps Program from 2012-2019. We find that women PIs’ I-Corps project proposals emphasized social impact significantly more than men PIs, while projects for all PIs emphasized commercial impact to a similar degree. We next ran a field experiment to estimate the causal impact of social impact vs. commercial motives by experimentally manipulating the recruitment email messages inviting researchers to participate in the I-Corps training program. We find that women were more likely to show interest in a social impact version of a message compared to a commercial version, while men showed equal interest in both types of messages. Taken together, our results indicate that women are more interested in pursuing commercialization and entrepreneurship activities when they are tackling societal problems. They suggest that low-cost interventions that emphasize the social impact value of entrepreneurial opportunities may increase gender diversity in entrepreneurship activities.
32885.zh_abstract: 本研究利用美国国家科学基金会创新军团项目，考察了学术创业中社会影响和商业动机的性别差异。I-Corps通过本地大学站点和全国性项目，为教师和研究生研究人员提供体验式创业培训。自I-Corps启动以来，仅有20%的参与者是女性。我们首先使用一个I-Corps大学站点的调查数据表明，女性参与者的社会创业意向高于商业创业意向，并且这些社会创业意向高于男性。然后，我们通过分析2012-2019年国家I-Corps项目的1267份公开项目摘要，扩展并推广了这一发现。我们发现，女性首席研究员的I-Corps项目提案比男性首席研究员更强调社会影响，而所有首席研究员的项目对商业影响的强调程度相似。接下来，我们进行了一项实地实验，通过实验性地操纵邀请研究人员参加I-Corps培训项目的招募邮件信息，来估计社会影响动机与商业动机的因果影响。我们发现，女性更可能对社会影响版本的信息表现出兴趣，而非商业版本，而男性对两种类型的信息表现出同等兴趣。综合来看，我们的结果表明，当女性解决社会问题时，她们对从事商业化和创业活动更感兴趣。这表明，强调创业机会社会影响价值的低成本干预措施可能增加创业活动中的性别多样性。

32884.title: Movements in Yields, not the Equity Premium: Bernanke-Kuttner Redux
32884.zh_title: 收益率变动，而非股权溢价：伯南克-库特纳再探
32884.abstract: We show that the stock market price reaction to monetary policy surprises upon announcements of the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) is explained mostly by changes in the default-free term structure of yields, not by changes in the equity premium. We reach this conclusion based on a new model-free method that uses dividend futures prices to obtain the counterfactual stock market index price change that results purely from the change in the default-free yield curve induced by the monetary policy surprise. The yield curve change in turn partly reflects a change in expected future short-term interest rates, as measured by changes in professional forecasts, and partly a change in the term premium. We further find that the even/odd week FOMC cycle in stock index returns is also largely due to an FOMC cycle in the yield curve rather than the equity premium.
32884.zh_abstract: 我们表明，联邦公开市场委员会公告时股票市场价格对货币政策意外的反应，主要由无违约期限结构的收益率变化解释，而非股权溢价的变化。我们基于一种新的无模型方法得出这一结论，该方法利用股息期货价格获得反事实的股票市场指数价格变化，该变化纯粹由货币政策意外引起的无违约收益率曲线变化所致。收益率曲线的变化部分反映了预期未来短期利率的变化（以专业预测的变化衡量），部分反映了期限溢价的变化。我们进一步发现，股票指数回报中的奇偶周FOMC周期也主要归因于收益率曲线的FOMC周期，而非股权溢价。

32883.title: Too Much of a Good Thing? How Narrow Targeting and Policy Interactions Influence Responses to California’s EITC
32883.zh_title: 好事过头反成坏事？精准瞄准与政策互动如何影响加州劳动所得税抵免的反应
32883.abstract: California has the highest Earned Income Tax (EITC) supplement to the federal EITC, with an 85% supplement rate. However, we find that despite the apparent generosity of the California EITC, there is no employment effect on less-skilled single mothers, in sharp contrast to the evidence of positive extensive margin effects of other state EITC supplements, and of the federal EITC. Our analysis points to two reasons why, unlike other EITCs, California’s EITC does not appear to have an extensive margin effect. First, most states simply supplement the federal EITC by a fixed percentage. In contrast, in California the maximum credit is reached at a much lower income level, the state EITC begins to phase out as soon as the maximum EITC payment is reached (i.e., there is no plateau), and the phase-out rate is as steep as the phase-in rate. The result is a much higher marginal tax rate that sets in at a much lower income level. Second, California has a very high (and rising) minimum wage. The interaction between a high minimum wage and the unique budget constraint created by the California EITC implies that workers who work more than a relatively low number of hours are unlikely to gain any extra income because of the EITC.
32883.zh_abstract: 加州拥有联邦劳动所得税抵免最高的州补充，补充率为85%。然而，我们发现，尽管加州EITC看似慷慨，但对低技能单身母亲没有就业效应，这与其它州EITC补充以及联邦EITC在广泛边际上产生积极效应的证据形成鲜明对比。我们的分析指出了两个原因，说明为何与其他EITC不同，加州EITC似乎没有广泛边际效应。首先，大多数州只是按固定百分比补充联邦EITC。相比之下，在加州，最高抵免额在低得多的收入水平达到，州EITC在达到最高EITC支付额后立即开始逐步取消（即没有平台期），并且逐步取消率与逐步引入率一样陡峭。结果是，在低得多的收入水平上出现了更高的边际税率。其次，加州有非常高且不断上涨的最低工资。高最低工资与加州EITC创造的独特预算约束之间的相互作用意味着，工作时间超过相对较低小时数的工人不太可能因EITC而获得任何额外收入。

32882.title: Risk, the Limits of Financial Risk Management, and Corporate Resilience
32882.zh_title: 风险、金融风险管理的局限性与企业韧性
32882.abstract: Existing evidence shows convincingly that expected cash flows of non-financial firms can be negatively affected by their total risk, so that non-financial firms can create shareholder wealth by managing their total risk. After reviewing theories that demonstrate links between firm value and total risk, I examine how financial risk management is used to manage firm total risk. I conclude from the evidence that the use of financial risk management is mostly limited to near-term risk in non-financial firms. I offer explanations for this limited role of financial risk management. I argue that the limitations of financial risk management make it important for firms to also focus on resilience and call for more research on the costs and benefits of resilience.
32882.zh_abstract: 现有证据令人信服地表明，非金融企业的预期现金流可能受到其总风险的负面影响，因此非金融企业可以通过管理其总风险来创造股东财富。在回顾了证明企业价值与总风险之间联系的理论之后，我考察了如何利用金融风险管理来管理企业总风险。我从证据中得出结论，金融风险管理的使用大多局限于非金融企业的短期风险。我对此有限作用提供了解释。我认为，金融风险管理的局限性使得企业同时关注韧性变得重要，并呼吁对韧性的成本和收益进行更多研究。

32881.title: Inflation and Treasury Convenience
32881.authors: Anna Cieslak, Wenhao Li, Carolin Pflueger
32881.abstract: We document that U.S. Treasury convenience moved positively with inflation during the inflationary second half of the 20th century but not before WWII or after 2000. A macro-asset pricing model explains this shift through two channels. Inflationary supply shocks raise the opportunity cost of holding money and money-like assets, endogenously increasing convenience yields. In contrast, exogenous liquidity demand shocks elevate convenience but depress consumption and inflation. Model estimates show that spikes in liquidity demand after 2000 account for the weaker convenience–inflation link and the emergence of negative bond-stock betas, distinguishing liquidity from non-liquidity demand shocks.
32881.zh_abstract: 我们记录到，在20世纪下半叶通胀时期，美国国债便利性与通胀呈正相关，但在二战前或2000年后则不然。一个宏观资产定价模型通过两个渠道解释了这种转变。通胀性供给冲击提高了持有货币及类货币资产的机会成本，内生地提升了便利收益率。相反，外生流动性需求冲击提升了便利性，但抑制了消费和通胀。模型估计显示，2000年后流动性需求激增解释了便利性-通胀关联的减弱以及负债券-股票贝塔系数的出现，从而将流动性需求冲击与非流动性需求冲击区分开来。

32880.title: Neoclassical Growth Transition Dynamics with One-Sided Commitment
32880.zh_title: 单边承诺下的新古典增长转型动态
32880.authors: Dirk Krueger, Fulin Li, Harald Uhlig
32880.abstract: This paper characterizes the transition dynamics of a continuous-time neoclassical production economy with capital accumulation in which households face idiosyncratic income risk and cannot commit to repay their debt. Therefore, even though a full set of contingent claims that pay out conditional on the realization of idiosyncratic shocks is available, the equilibrium features imperfect insurance and a non-degenerate cross-sectional consumption distribution. When household labor productivity takes two values, one of which is zero, and the utility function is logarithmic, we characterize the entire transition dynamics induced by unexpected technology shocks, including the evolution of the consumption distribution, in closed form. Thus, the model constitutes an analytically tractable alternative to the standard incomplete markets general equilibrium Aiyagari (1994) model by retaining its physical environment, but replacing the incomplete asset markets structure with one in which limits to consumption insurance emerge endogenously due to limited commitment.
32880.zh_abstract: 本文刻画了一个具有资本积累的连续时间新古典生产经济中的转型动态，其中家庭面临异质性收入风险且无法承诺偿还债务。因此，即使存在一组完全的条件索取权（根据异质性冲击的实现支付），均衡仍具有不完全保险和非退化的横截面消费分布。当家庭劳动生产率取两个值（其中一个为零）且效用函数为对数形式时，我们以闭式解刻画了由意外技术冲击引发的整个转型动态，包括消费分布的演变。因此，该模型构成了标准不完全市场一般均衡Aiyagari（1994）模型的一个分析上易处理的替代方案，它保留了其物理环境，但用有限承诺内生产生消费保险限制的结构取代了不完全资产市场结构。

32879.title: The Declining Mental Health of the Young in the UK
32879.zh_title: 英国年轻人心理健康状况的持续恶化
32879.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson, David N.F. Bell
32879.abstract: We show the incidence of mental ill-health has been rising especially among the young in the years and especially so in Scotland. The incidence of mental ill-health among young men in particular, started rising in 2008 with the onset of the Great Recession and for young women around 2012. The age profile of mental ill-health shifts to the left, over time, such that the peak of depression shifts from mid-life, when people are in their late 40s and early 50s, around the time of the Great Recession, to one’s early to mid-20s in 2023. These trends are much more pronounced if one drops the large number of proxy respondents in the UK Labour Force Surveys, indicating fellow family members understate the poor mental health of respondents, especially if those respondents are young. We report consistent evidence from the Scottish Health Surveys and UK samples from Eurobarometer surveys. Our findings are consistent with those for the United States and suggest that, although smartphone technologies may be closely correlated with a decline in young people’s mental health, increases in mental ill-health in the UK from the late 1990s suggest other factors must also be at play.
32879.zh_abstract: 我们指出，近年来心理健康问题的发生率持续上升，尤其在年轻人中更为显著，而苏格兰地区的情况尤为突出。年轻男性的心理健康问题发生率自2008年大衰退开始后上升，而年轻女性则大约从2012年开始上升。随着时间的推移，心理健康问题的年龄分布曲线向左移动，抑郁症的高峰期从大衰退时期人们四五十岁的中年阶段，转移到了2023年的二十岁出头。如果剔除英国劳动力调查中大量的代理受访者数据，这些趋势会更加明显，这表明家庭成员（尤其是年轻受访者的家人）往往会低估受访者的不良心理健康状况。我们从苏格兰健康调查和欧洲晴雨表调查的英国样本中报告了一致的证据。我们的发现与美国的证据相符，并表明，尽管智能手机技术可能与年轻人心理健康的下降密切相关，但自20世纪90年代末以来英国心理健康问题的增加表明，其他因素也必然在起作用。

32878.title: Minimum Wages in the 21st Century
32878.abstract: This chapter surveys the literature on the impact of minimum wages on low-wage labor markets. We describe and critically review the empirical methods in the new minimum wage literature, particularly those leveraging quasi-experimental variation. We provide a quantitative overview of the most recent evidence on the employment and wage effects of the policy. We also explore emerging research on its impact on other margins, including amenities, other inputs (such as capital and high-skilled workers), firm entry and exit, as well as output prices, demand, profits, and productivity. This approach allows us to present a comprehensive picture of how minimum wage policies affect firms, workers, and labor markets. We also review the evidence on the policy’s impact on wage inequality and income distribution. Finally, we discuss how these effects can vary depending on the economic context and the level of a country’s development.
32878.zh_abstract: 本章综述了关于最低工资对低工资劳动力市场影响的文献。我们描述并批判性地评述了新的最低工资文献中的实证方法，特别是那些利用准实验变异的方法。我们对该政策在就业和工资方面影响的最新证据进行了定量概述。我们还探讨了关于其其他方面影响的新兴研究，包括工作条件、其他投入（如资本和高技能工人）、企业进入与退出，以及产出价格、需求、利润和生产率。这种方法使我们能够全面展示最低工资政策如何影响企业、工人和劳动力市场。我们还回顾了该政策对工资不平等和收入分配影响的证据。最后，我们讨论了这些影响如何根据经济背景和国家发展水平而有所不同。

32877.title: Capital Controls on Outflows: New Evidence and a Theoretical Framework
32877.zh_title: 资本流出管制：新证据与理论框架
32877.authors: Roberto Chang, Andrés Fernández, Humberto Martinez
32877.abstract: We study capital controls on outflows (CCOs) in situations of macroeconomic and financial distress. We present novel empirical evidence indicating that CCO implementation is associated with crises and declines in GDP growth. We then develop a theoretical framework that is consistent with such empirical findings and also yields policy and welfare lessons. The theory features costly coordination failures by foreign investors which can sometimes be avoided by suitably tailored CCOs. The benefits of CCOs as coordination devices can make them optimal even if CCOs entail deadweight losses; if the latter are large, however, CCOs are detrimental for welfare. We show that optimal CCOs can suffer from time inconsistency, and also how political opportunism may limit CCO policy. Hence government credibility and reputation building emerge as critical for the successful implementation of CCOs.
32877.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在宏观经济和金融困境情境下的资本流出管制。我们提出了新的实证证据，表明资本流出管制的实施与危机和GDP增长下降相关。然后，我们构建了一个与这些实证发现相一致的理论框架，并得出了政策和福利方面的启示。该理论强调了外国投资者之间代价高昂的协调失灵，而通过适当设计的资本流出管制有时可以避免这种失灵。即使资本流出管制带来无谓损失，其作为协调机制的好处也可能使其成为最优选择；然而，如果这些损失很大，资本流出管制则会对福利产生不利影响。我们表明，最优的资本流出管制可能存在时间不一致性问题，并且政治机会主义也可能限制资本流出管制政策。因此，政府的可信度和声誉建设对于资本流出管制的成功实施至关重要。

32876.title: Exchange Rate Determination under Limits to CIP Arbitrage
32876.zh_title: 在抵补利率平价套利受限条件下的汇率决定
32876.authors: Philippe Bacchetta, J. Scott Davis, Eric van Wincoop
32876.abstract: Recent theories of exchange rate determination have emphasized limited UIP arbitrage by international financial institutions. New regulations since 2008 have also lead to imperfect CIP arbitrage. We show that under limited CIP arbitrage the exchange rate and CIP deviation are jointly determined by equilibrium in the FX spot and swap markets. The model is used to investigate the impact of a wide range of financial shocks. The exchange rate is affected by a new set of financial shocks that operate through the swap market, which have no effect under perfect CIP arbitrage. More familiar financial shocks that impact the spot market have an amplified effect on the exchange rate as a result of their feedback to the swap market. Implications of the model are consistent with a broad range of evidence.
32876.zh_abstract: 近期的汇率决定理论强调了国际金融机构有限的无抵补利率平价套利。自2008年以来的新监管规定也导致了不完全的抵补利率平价套利。我们表明，在抵补利率平价套利受限的情况下，汇率和抵补利率平价偏差是由外汇即期市场和掉期市场的均衡共同决定的。该模型被用于研究一系列广泛金融冲击的影响。汇率受到一组通过掉期市场发挥作用的新金融冲击的影响，这些冲击在完美的抵补利率平价套利下没有影响。更常见的、影响即期市场的金融冲击，由于其对掉期市场的反馈效应，对汇率产生了放大的影响。该模型的含义与广泛的证据一致。

32875.title: Innovation Networks in the Industrial Revolution
32875.zh_title: 工业革命中的创新网络
32875.authors: Lukas Rosenberger, W. Walker Hanlon, Carl Hallmann
32875.abstract: We offer a new approach to understanding technological progress and economic growth during the Industrial Revolution using modern growth theory combined with detailed micro-data. We develop a multi-sector endogenous growth model that we use to study one leading theory of British advantage during the Industrial Revolution: knowledge access costs. We apply our model to patent data from Britain and France in order to estimate key parameters, including vectors of country and technology-specific knowledge access parameters. We validate our estimates and then use the model to study their implications during the transition to modern economic growth. We show that, relative to France, British inventors faced lower knowledge access barriers, a difference that generated meaningful growth rate differences on the transition path, even when accounting for cross-country knowledge and technology flows.
32875.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种理解工业革命期间技术进步和经济增长的新方法，该方法结合了现代增长理论与详细的微观数据。我们构建了一个多部门内生增长模型，用于研究英国在工业革命期间优势的一个主要理论：知识获取成本。我们将模型应用于英国和法国的专利数据，以估计关键参数，包括国家和技术特定的知识获取参数向量。我们验证了估计结果，然后使用该模型研究这些参数在向现代经济增长转型过程中的含义。我们表明，与法国相比，英国发明家面临的知识获取障碍更低，这种差异在转型路径上产生了显著的增长速率差异，即使考虑了跨国知识和技术的流动也是如此。

32874.title: Industrial Composition of Syndicated Loans and Banks' Climate Commitments
32874.zh_title: 银团贷款的行业构成与银行的气候承诺
32874.authors: Galina Hale, Brigid Meisenbacher, Fernanda Nechio
32874.abstract: In the past two decades, a number of banks joined global initiatives aimed to mitigate climate change by “greening” their asset portfolios. We study whether banks that made such commitments have a different emission exposure of their portfolios of syndicated loans than banks that did not. We rely on loan-level information with global coverage combined with country-industry information on emissions. We find that all banks have reduced their loan-emission exposures over the last 8 years. However, we do not find differences between banks that did and those that did not signal their sustainability goals, with the exception of early signers of Principles of Responsible Investments (PRI), who already had lower exposure to emissions through their syndicated lending. In addition, banks that signed PRI shortened the maturity of the loans extended to highly-emitting industries but only temporarily. Thus, we conclude that banks reduced their exposure to climate transition risks on average, but voluntary climate commitments did not contribute to syndicated loan reallocation away from highly-emitting sectors.
32874.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，许多银行加入了旨在通过“绿化”其资产组合来减缓气候变化的全球倡议。我们研究了做出此类承诺的银行，其银团贷款组合的排放敞口是否与未做出承诺的银行不同。我们依赖于覆盖全球的贷款层面信息，并结合国家-行业层面的排放数据。我们发现，所有银行在过去8年中都降低了其贷款排放敞口。然而，我们没有发现那些表明其可持续发展目标的银行与未表明的银行之间存在差异，但早期签署《负责任投资原则》的银行除外，这些银行通过其银团贷款已经具有较低的排放敞口。此外，签署《负责任投资原则》的银行缩短了向高排放行业发放贷款的期限，但这只是暂时的。因此，我们得出结论，银行平均降低了其对气候转型风险的敞口，但自愿的气候承诺并未促使银团贷款从高排放行业重新配置出去。

32873.title: How the World Became Rich by Mark Koyama and Jared Rubin and Slouching Towards Utopia, by J. Bradford DeLong: A Review Essay
32873.zh_title: 评马克·科亚马和贾里德·鲁宾的《世界如何变得富有》与J·布拉德福德·德隆的《蹒跚走向乌托邦》
32873.abstract: This essay provides a review of two important recent books on economic growth: How the World Became Rich by Mark Koyama and Jared Rubin and Slouching Towards Utopia, by J. Bradford DeLong. Each book is noteworthy for its erudition and breadth. I explore strengths and weaknesses of these books and make some proposals on new ways to conceptualize and study long run socioeconomic development. My discussion emphasizes the importance of contingency in determining long run inequalities across countries as well the potential for ideas from complexity theory to augment standard growth modelling.
32873.zh_abstract: 本文评述了近期关于经济增长的两部重要著作：马克·科亚马和贾里德·鲁宾的《世界如何变得富有》以及J·布拉德福德·德隆的《蹒跚走向乌托邦》。每本书都以其博学和广度而著称。我探讨了这些书的优点和缺点，并就概念化和研究长期社会经济发展的新方法提出了一些建议。我的讨论强调了偶然性在决定各国长期不平等中的重要性，以及复杂性理论的思想在增强标准增长模型方面的潜力。

32899.title: Incentives to Vaccinate
32899.authors: Pol Campos-Mercade, Armando N. Meier, Stephan Meier, Devin G. Pope, Florian H. Schneider, Erik Wengström
32899.abstract: Whether monetary incentives to change behavior work and how they should be structured are fundamental economic questions. We overcome typical data limitations in a large-scale field experiment on vaccination (N = 5,324) with a unique combination of administrative and survey data. We find that guaranteed incentives of $\$20$ increase uptake by 13 percentage points in the short run and 9 in the long run. Guaranteed incentives are more effective than lottery-based, prosocial, or individually-targeted incentives, though all boost vaccinations. There are no unintended consequences on future vaccination or heterogeneities based on vaccination attitudes and incentivized economic preferences. Further, administrative data on relatives shows substantial positive spillovers. Our findings demonstrate the great potential of incentives for improving public health and provide guidance on their design.
32899.zh_abstract: 货币激励能否改变行为以及如何设计这些激励措施是基本的经济学问题。我们通过一项大规模疫苗接种实地实验（样本量N=5,324），结合独特的行政数据和调查数据，克服了典型的数据限制。研究发现，20美元的确定性激励在短期内使疫苗接种率提高13个百分点，长期内提高9个百分点。确定性激励比基于抽奖、亲社会或针对个人的激励更有效，尽管所有激励措施都促进了疫苗接种。这些激励措施对未来疫苗接种没有产生意外后果，也未基于疫苗接种态度和激励性经济偏好表现出异质性。此外，关于亲属的行政数据显示出显著的正向溢出效应。我们的研究结果证明了激励措施在改善公共卫生方面的巨大潜力，并为其设计提供了指导。
32899.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：C93, D01, D62, I12, I18

32898.title: Equilibrium Evictions
32898.authors: Dean Corbae, Andrew Glover, Michael Nattinger
32898.abstract: We develop a simple equilibrium model of rental markets for housing in which eviction occurs endogenously. Both landlords and renters lack commitment; a landlord evicts a delinquent tenant if they do not expect total future rent payments to cover costs, while tenants cannot commit to paying more rent than they would be able or willing to pay given their outside option of searching for a new rental. Renters who are persistently delinquent are more likely to be evicted and pay more per quality-adjusted unit of housing than renters who are less likely to be delinquent. Evictions due to a tenant’s inability to pay are never socially efficient, and lead to lower quality investment in housing and too few vacancies relative to the socially optimal allocation. Government policies that restrict landlords’ ability to evict can improve welfare relative to laissez-faire, but a full moratorium on evictions only raises welfare when it is temporarily adopted in response to a large adverse shock. Finally, rent support can effectively eliminate evictions even without covering all missed rent and delivers significantly larger gains than eviction restrictions.
32898.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个简单的住房租赁市场均衡模型，其中驱逐是内生的。房东和租户都缺乏承诺；如果房东预期未来的总租金支付无法覆盖成本，就会驱逐拖欠租金的租户，而租户则无法承诺支付超出其能力或意愿（基于其寻找新租房的替代选择）的租金。持续拖欠租金的租户更可能被驱逐，并且每质量调整单位住房的支付高于不太可能拖欠租金的租户。因租户无力支付而导致的驱逐在社会效率上从未达到最优，并且会导致住房质量投资降低以及相对于社会最优配置而言过少的空置率。与自由放任相比，限制房东驱逐能力的政府政策可以改善福利，但全面暂停驱逐只有在为应对大规模不利冲击而临时采用时才能提高福利。最后，租金支持即使不覆盖所有拖欠租金，也能有效消除驱逐，并且带来的收益显著大于驱逐限制。

32897.title: Federal Pandemic Relief and Academic Recovery
32897.zh_title: 联邦疫情救助与学业恢复
32897.authors: Dan C. Dewey, Erin M. Fahle, Thomas J. Kane, Sean F. Reardon, Douglas O. Staiger
32897.abstract: We measure the effect of district use of federal pandemic relief during the 2022-23 school year for a sample of more than 5000 districts in 29 states. We rely on several plausibly exogenous sources of variation in federal grants: differences in state Title I funding formulas, estimation error in Census local area poverty rates and differences in eligibility for federal Title I and subsidized lunch eligibility. We find that each $\$1000$ in spending per student was associated with a .0086 SD improvement in math and a .0049 SD improvement in reading. Both are consistent with a recent meta-analysis of spending impacts by Jackson and Mackevicius (2023). As a placebo test, we find no relationship between federal dollars that were not yet spent during the 2022-23 year. We also find similar results using synthetic control group methods to compare high-poverty districts with high and low amounts of federal aid, but with similar trends in achievement through 2022. Because the federal aid was targeted at higher poverty districts, we find the federal dollars not only contributed to the recovery, but also helped narrow the gaps in achievement which had widened during the pandemic.
32897.zh_abstract: 我们测量了2022-23学年期间，来自29个州超过5000个学区的样本中，学区使用联邦疫情救助资金的效果。我们依赖于联邦拨款中几个看似外生的变异来源：各州Title I资助公式的差异、人口普查局地方贫困率估计的误差，以及联邦Title I资格和补贴午餐资格的差异。我们发现，每名学生每增加1000美元支出，数学成绩提高0.0086个标准差，阅读成绩提高0.0049个标准差。这两个结果与Jackson和Mackevicius（2023）近期关于支出影响的元分析一致。作为安慰剂检验，我们发现2022-23学年尚未支出的联邦资金与学业成绩之间没有关系。我们还使用合成控制组方法，比较了高贫困学区中联邦援助金额高和低的群体，这些群体在2022年之前的成绩趋势相似，得出了类似的结果。由于联邦援助针对高贫困学区，我们发现联邦资金不仅促进了学业恢复，还有助于缩小疫情期间扩大的成绩差距。
32897.meta: Programs：CH, ED；JEL：I20, I21, I22, I24, I28

32896.title: (Dis)Information Wars
32896.authors: Adrian Casillas, Maryam Farboodi, Layla Hashemi, Maryam Saeedi, Steven Wilson
32896.abstract: Over the past decade, social media platforms have emerged as prominent vehicles for displaying dissent. In response, various actors have increasingly spread fake news on these platforms to impair the opposition—the (dis)information war. We analyze a methodology to identify disinformation using network-based characteristics of the news initiators, and use data from Twitter (now X) to assess the effectiveness of this method in limiting the spread of disinformation. We find that it detects at least 85% of verified instances of disinformation without misidentifying any true news, and reduces both account engagement and lifespan of disinformation by at least a factor of two, highlighting the importance of swift discovery of disinformation to interrupt its exponential spread.
32896.zh_abstract: 在过去十年中，社交媒体平台已成为展示异议的重要载体。作为回应，各种行为者越来越多地在这些平台上传播假新闻以削弱反对派——即（虚假）信息战。我们分析了一种利用新闻发起者网络特征来识别虚假信息的方法，并使用来自Twitter（现为X）的数据评估该方法在限制虚假信息传播方面的有效性。我们发现，该方法在不误判任何真实新闻的情况下，至少检测出85%的已验证虚假信息案例，并将虚假信息的账户参与度和生命周期至少降低一半，这凸显了快速发现虚假信息以中断其指数级传播的重要性。
